title: HoloscanRecognition
description: The canonical shape of a HoloscanRecognition record — docs/56-WPI-11-HOLOSCAN-ARCHITECTURE-FREEZE.md §11.1's capture-session entity, Batch WPI-11 (docs/50-PHASE-3-TECHNICAL-PLAN.md §19, ADR-024/025/026), governed by docs/53-PHASE-3-IMPLEMENTATION-RULES.md. One row per patient-initiated photo submission — the parent of zero or more HoloscanRecognitionItem candidate rows (holoscan-recognition-item.schema.json). Patient-owned at creation (the upload act), system-owned thereafter (pipeline-driven status transitions only) — the patient never edits or deletes a recognition once submitted (docs/56 §11.1's 'logged, never edited' discipline). `image_refs` follows docs/44 §11.4's JSON-storage policy exactly as CalculatorResult.input_snapshot already established: stored as a JSON-encoded string in the underlying Sheet cell, but this schema describes it as a real array value, since apps-script/HoloscanRecognition.gs's own row-to-API-shape conversion always parses it back before returning a record to any caller.

recognition_id.description: Server-generated UUID (generateFoundationId_()), this row's own identity — never patient-supplied.

patient_id.description: The Patient Identity who submitted this recognition (docs/56 §11.1). Always PatientSession-derived — never client-supplied. Immutable after creation.

image_refs.description: One entry per uploaded image, `{drive_file_id, mime_type, size_bytes}` — reuses Report.gs's own file-metadata shape (docs/33 §3.3, docs/56 §11.1), never a new file-reference convention. Immutable after creation. Stored as a JSON-encoded string in the underlying Sheet cell — an implementation-only detail; every function returning a record to a caller parses it back into this real array shape first.

status.description: One-way transition, mirrors Appointment/DoctorInstruction's existing transition discipline (docs/56 §11.1). Always 'uploaded' at creation.

model.description: The vision-capable OpenRouter model identifier used for this recognition, mirroring AIAssistantInteraction.model's precedent. Empty-string sentinel until the pipeline actually calls the model.

prompt_template_version.description: Matches the version-controlled recognition-instruction prompt (apps-script/HOLOSCAN-PROMPTS.md), mirrors AIAssistantInteraction.prompt_template_version's convention. Empty-string sentinel until the pipeline actually calls the model.

processed_at.description: Server-set when status leaves 'processing' (either 'completed' or 'failed'). Empty-string sentinel while still 'uploaded'/'processing' — mirrors login-token.schema.json's used_at convention (a plain string type, never real null, ADR-006).

error_log.description: Mirrors ConsultationSummary.error_log's own precedent (docs/56 §11.1); populated only on status: 'failed'. Empty-string sentinel otherwise.
